chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1899 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.11.2025 Petitioners are present in person Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w IO SIP Muhammad Ali Ansari Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G Sindh *** Investigation Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR bearing Crime No.513 of 2025 registered at P.S Badin under Sections 365-B and 34 PPC and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage of free-will with petitioner No.2. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of lady petitioner he will file his final report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to file his report keeping in view the statement of lady petitioner before learned Magistrate within seven days for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Meanwhile petitioners shall not be arrested in above FIR and they may be provided protection. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
